name: Ascend Wellness Holdings, Inc.
business: Ascend Wellness Holdings, Inc. is a vertically integrated multi-state cannabis operator. Its core business is the cultivation, manufacturing, and distribution of cannabis consumer packaged goods, sold through company-owned retail stores, retail partner locations, and third-party licensed retail locations. As of December 31, 2025, it had operations in seven U.S. markets: Illinois, Maryland, Massachusetts, Michigan, New Jersey, Ohio, and Pennsylvania.
sellsTo: wholesale customers in Illinois, New Jersey, and Massachusetts

exposures.sentence: Ascend s core business is the cultivation, manufacturing, and distribution of cannabis consumer packaged goods, which are sold through company-owned retail stores, to retail partner locations, and third-party licensed retail locations.
Ascend operates cultivation facilities in six states with approximately 258,000 square feet of total canopy.
Over 85% of customers at AWH retail locations utilize eCommerce technology, including kiosk menus, for ordering and pick-up.

catalysts.event: Two (3) additional dispensaries under development expected to open
catalysts.sentence: Two (3) additional dispensaries are under development and are expected to open in 2026.

catalysts.event: One additional dispensary under construction expected to open
catalysts.sentence: One additional dispensary is under construction and is expected to open in 2026.
The Registration Statement became effective on January 22, 2026.

catalysts.event: Closing of Midwest Retail Partner One transaction
catalysts.sentence: The Company anticipates that closing of the transaction may occur in the first half of 2026.
